title: Edge AI-Powered Multi-Disaster Prediction & Alert System
description: Built a unified Edge AI platform capable of predicting floods, earthquakes, and cyclones using optimized machine learning models.

title: Smart Crop Recommendation System using OCR & NLP
description: Developed an AI-powered agricultural recommendation system that extracts nutrient information from soil report images using OCR, Regex, and NLP techniques.

title: Multi-Stage FIFO Ticket Booking System
description: Designed a high-concurrency ticket booking system capable of handling 50,000+ concurrent users while maintaining strict FIFO ticket allocation.

title: Marketing Campaign Analysis Dashboard
description: Performed end-to-end marketing campaign analysis to evaluate campaign effectiveness and customer engagement.

title: Web Scraping & Job Data Extraction System
description: Developed an automated web scraping solution that collects job listings from Naukri.com and exports clean datasets.

title: Personalized Nutrition Health Optimizer
description: Designed and developed an AI-powered recommendation system that provides personalized dietary suggestions.

title: Livestock Disease Detection using Hybrid Quantum-Classical Neural Networks
description: Developed a Hybrid Quantum-Classical Neural Network (HQCNN) architecture for livestock disease classification.
